content_fingerprint: sensenova details end to end approach to building native multimodal unified models sensenova researchers have published a technical walkthrough of neo unify a framework for training multimodal models natively from the ground up rather than bolting perception modules onto a pre trained language backbone researchers haiwen diao lewei lu and ziwei liu have posted a detailed account of neo unify on the hugging face blog describing an end to end methodology for training models that natively unify text image audio and other modalities from initialization rather than combining separately pre trained
